deep_dive.title: High-Fidelity Synthetic Transmission Electron Microscopy Image Generation Using Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Data-Limited Semiconductor Metrology
deep_dive.abstract: Advanced semiconductor nodes drastically increased demand for Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM), yet destructive sample preparation, slow imaging and high costs severely limit the availability of diverse datasets needed for downstream machine learning (ML). Synthetic data generation is becoming essential, but current generative models often miss TEM-specific noise, structural detail, and stochastic variability crucial for evaluation. We present a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) framework for synthetic TEM image generation under extreme data scarcity. A progressive patch-based training strategy scales from low-resolution patches to full images, enabling from-scratch training with only 15 samples. We integrate a custom TrivialAugment adaptation, cross-process domain transfer, classifier guidance, and RePaint-style inpainting, culminating in full-image generation that preserves global structural and spatial relationships in compliance with FAB metrology requirements. Beyond synthesis, we repurpose DDPM feature representations for segmentation, partitioning encoder feature maps to obtain coherent region masks. Our synthetic images achieve up to MS-SSIM > 0.98 and qualitative expert assessment consistent with structural similarity results, facilitating downstream ML training for defect detection, segmentation, and metrology while preserving statistical and physical realism.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: diffusion model for TEM image generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 扩散模型用于TEM图像生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 扩散模型用于TEM图像生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 扩散模型用于TEM图像生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: A DDPM framework generates high-fidelity synthetic TEM images under data scarcity, using progressive patch-based training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对半导体计量中TEM图像数据稀缺的问题，本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的合成图像生成框架。通过渐进式分块训练策略，从低分辨率到全图像扩展，生成高保真度的TEM图像。该方法有效捕捉了TEM特有的噪声和结构细节，为数据受限的下游机器学习任务提供了可靠数据源。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对半导体计量中TEM图像数据稀缺的问题，本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的合成图像生成框架。通过渐进式分块训练策略，从低分辨率到全图像扩展，生成高保真度的TEM图像。该方法有效捕捉了TEM特有的噪声和结构细节，为数据受限的下游机器学习任务提供了可靠数据源。

quick_skim.title: Don't Settle at the Mode! Mitigating Diversity Collapse in Pretrained Flow Models via Feature Self-Guidance
quick_skim.abstract: State-of-the-art flow models generate stunning images from text or image prompts. However, they suffer from diversity collapse when generating multiple samples under the same conditioning. Existing methods address this issue via either latent guidance, which has limited effectiveness, or sample selection, which relies on external reward models that incur significant inference-time overhead. In this work, we introduce an efficient, training-free self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse without requiring additional reward models. Specifically, we disperse the internal features of the flow model during batch generation with feature self-guidance. Further, to keep the features close to the manifold, we introduce a manifold regularization step that projects these dispersed features back onto the data manifold, ensuring diverse generation without sacrificing alignment with the input conditions. Our method integrates seamlessly as a plug-and-play module into pretrained flow models, adding only a marginal inference cost. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements in diversity while preserving fidelity across several conditional flow models, including multi-step and few-step text-to-image, depth-to-image, and reference image generation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training-free self-guidance to mitigate diversity collapse in flow generative models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 免训练自引导缓解生成流模型多样性崩溃
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 免训练自引导缓解生成流模型多样性崩溃
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 免训练自引导缓解生成流模型多样性崩溃
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a training-free feature self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse in pretrained flow models during batch generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对预训练流模型在生成多个样本时出现的多样性崩溃问题，本文提出了一种高效的免训练特征自引导机制。通过在批次生成过程中分散内部特征，并保持特征在流形附近，有效提升了生成样本的多样性，无需额外奖励模型或重训练。该方法在图像生成任务上验证了其有效性，为生成模型的多样性优化提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对预训练流模型在生成多个样本时出现的多样性崩溃问题，本文提出了一种高效的免训练特征自引导机制。通过在批次生成过程中分散内部特征，并保持特征在流形附近，有效提升了生成样本的多样性，无需额外奖励模型或重训练。该方法在图像生成任务上验证了其有效性，为生成模型的多样性优化提供了新思路。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: optimization methods that do not require training for diffusion models
